result:
I make sure every child, everywhere, wakes up safe, fed, and believed in.  
No more hunger that clocks the hours until the next meal, no more bombs replacing lullabies, no adult gaze that says “you don’t matter yet.”  
With that single shift—childhood rescued from fear—the cascading effects rewrite everything else: the future of education, health, economies, even the planet itself, because a generation raised in safety and respect grows up unable to stomach cruelty or waste.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
